```{r explanatory-basis-divergence-auprc-decomposition, fig.width=11.5, fig.height=7.2}
      is.finite(.data$basis_pred_delta),
      is.finite(.data$residual_delta)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data$chain, .data$transition) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      transition_intercept = mean(.data$residual_delta, na.rm = TRUE),
      basis_plus_intercept_delta = .data$basis_pred_delta +
        .data$transition_intercept,
      residual_after_intercept = .data$observed_delta -
        .data$basis_plus_intercept_delta
    ) %>%
    dplyr::ungroup()

  auprc_basis_decomp_summary <- auprc_basis_decomp %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data$chain, .data$transition) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      n = dplyr::n(),
      observed_mean = mean(.data$observed_delta, na.rm = TRUE),
      basis_mean = mean(.data$basis_pred_delta, na.rm = TRUE),
      transition_intercept = dplyr::first(.data$transition_intercept),
      fitted_mean = mean(.data$basis_plus_intercept_delta, na.rm = TRUE),
      residual_after_intercept_mean = mean(
        .data$residual_after_intercept,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      basis_share_of_mean = .data$basis_mean / .data$observed_mean,
      median_basis_share_when_gain = stats::median(
        .data$basis_share[.data$observed_delta >= 0.01],
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      mean_divergence_improvement = mean(
        .data$divergence_improvement,
        na.rm = TRUE
      ),
      basis_r2_with_transition_intercept = {
        sst <- sum(
          (.data$observed_delta - mean(.data$observed_delta, na.rm = TRUE))^2,
          na.rm = TRUE
        )
        sse <- sum(
          (.data$observed_delta - .data$basis_plus_intercept_delta)^2,
          na.rm = TRUE
        )
        if (is.finite(sst) && sst > 0) 1 - sse / sst else NA_real_
      },
      basis_observed_cor = stats::cor(
        .data$basis_pred_delta,
        .data$observed_delta,
        use = "complete.obs"
      ),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  readr::write_csv(
    auprc_basis_decomp,
    file.path(diagnostic_dir,
              "truth_drift_auprc_basis_decomposition_rows.csv")
  )
  readr::write_csv(
    auprc_basis_decomp_summary,
    file.path(diagnostic_dir,
              "truth_drift_auprc_basis_decomposition_summary.csv")
  )
  cat("AUPRC decomposition using baseline nonlinear divergence curve:\n")
  print(auprc_basis_decomp_summary)

  decomp_lim <- max(abs(c(
    auprc_basis_decomp$observed_delta,
    auprc_basis_decomp$basis_pred_delta
  )), na.rm = TRUE)
  decomp_lim <- max(0.05, decomp_lim)
  decomp_plot_lim <- 0.4

  auprc_basis_decomp_plot <- auprc_basis_decomp %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      basis_pred_delta_plot = pmin(
        pmax(.data$basis_pred_delta, -decomp_plot_lim),
        decomp_plot_lim
      ),
      observed_delta_plot = pmin(
        pmax(.data$observed_delta, -decomp_plot_lim),
        decomp_plot_lim
      )
    )

  decomp_annotation <- auprc_basis_decomp_summary %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      x = -0.96 * decomp_plot_lim,
      y = 0.94 * decomp_plot_lim,
      label = sprintf(
        paste0(
          "R^2 = %.2f\n",
          "observed mean = %.3f\n",
          "basis shift = %.3f\n",
          "non-basis shift = %.3f"
        ),
        .data$basis_r2_with_transition_intercept,
        .data$observed_mean,
        .data$basis_mean,
        .data$transition_intercept
      )
    )

  p_basis_explain_scatter <- ggplot(
    auprc_basis_decomp_plot,
    aes(x = .data$basis_pred_delta_plot, y = .data$observed_delta_plot,
        color = .data$start_divergence_bin)
  ) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey65", linewidth = 0.25) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, color = "grey35",
                linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.35) +
    geom_abline(
      data = auprc_basis_decomp_summary,
      aes(intercept = .data$transition_intercept, slope = 1),
      inherit.aes = FALSE, color = "#c44e52", linewidth = 0.45
    ) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.58, size = 1.45, stroke = 0) +
    geom_label(
      data = decomp_annotation,
      aes(x = .data$x, y = .data$y, label = .data$label),
      inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 0, vjust = 1,
      size = 2.55, label.size = 0.16, fill = "white",
      color = "grey18", alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    facet_grid(chain ~ transition) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = baseline_bin_palette,
      name = "Baseline basis\ndivergence"
    ) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-decomp_plot_lim, decomp_plot_lim),
                    ylim = c(-decomp_plot_lim, decomp_plot_lim)) +
    labs(
      x = "Predicted delta AUPRC from basis movement",
      y = "Observed delta AUPRC",
      title = "Decomposing AUPRC gains"
    ) +
    theme_effect_paper(base_size = 9) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  ggsave(
    file.path(diagnostic_dir,
              "truth_drift_auprc_basis_decomposition.png"),
    p_basis_explain_scatter, width = 11.5, height = 6.2, dpi = 220,
    bg = "white"
  )
  print(p_basis_explain_scatter)
} else {
  message(
    "Skipping AUPRC basis decomposition; need trajectory_long and ",
    "baseline divergence smoother."
  )
}
```

```{r explanatory-basis-divergence-paper-figure, fig.width=12, fig.height=16.5}
if (exists("p_baseline_truth") &&
    exists("p_baseline_boxplot") &&
    exists("combined_3col") &&
    exists("p_basis_explain_scatter")) {
  paper_basis_divergence_fig <- patchwork::wrap_plots(
    (p_baseline_truth | p_baseline_boxplot),
    combined_3col,
    p_basis_explain_scatter,
    ncol = 1,
    heights = c(0.78, 1.18, 1.08)
  ) +
    plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
    theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11))

  ggsave(
    paper_basis_divergence_png,
    paper_basis_divergence_fig,
    width = 12, height = 16.5, dpi = 300, bg = "white",
    limitsize = FALSE
  )
  cat("Wrote basis-divergence paper figure to ",
      paper_basis_divergence_png, "\n", sep = "")
  print(paper_basis_divergence_fig)
} else {
  message(
    "Skipping basis-divergence paper figure; need baseline, 3-column, ",
    "and decomposition panels."
  )
}
```

```{r explanatory-basis-divergence-trajectory-quadrant, fig.width=11.5, fig.height=5.2}
# Revised trajectory plot:
#   - thicker, less faded per-dataset paths
#   - paths colored by the cold -> warm net (AUPRC, divergence) quadrant
#   - centroid arrows stratified by the dataset's cold (baseline) basis
#     divergence bin (3 centroid trajectories per chain facet)
if (exists("trajectory_long")) {
  # Per (dataset, chain): the cold -> warm net (AUPRC, divergence) quadrant
  # and the dataset's baseline (cold) divergence bin.
  net_movement <- trajectory_long %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$state %in% c("cold", "warm")) %>%
    dplyr::select(.data$dataset_bundle_id, .data$chain, .data$state,
                  .data$truth_drift, .data$auprc) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from = .data$state,
      values_from = c(.data$truth_drift, .data$auprc)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      delta_auprc = .data$auprc_warm - .data$auprc_cold,
      delta_divergence = .data$truth_drift_warm - .data$truth_drift_cold,
      quadrant = dplyr::case_when(
        .data$delta_auprc >= 0 & .data$delta_divergence <= 0 ~
          "+AUPRC, -divergence",
        .data$delta_auprc >= 0 & .data$delta_divergence > 0  ~
          "+AUPRC, +divergence",
        .data$delta_auprc < 0  & .data$delta_divergence <= 0 ~
          "-AUPRC, -divergence",
        .data$delta_auprc < 0  & .data$delta_divergence > 0  ~
          "-AUPRC, +divergence"
      ),
      baseline_bin = basis_divergence_bin(.data$truth_drift_cold)
    )

  trajectory_long_q <- trajectory_long %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(
      net_movement %>%
        dplyr::select(.data$dataset_bundle_id, .data$chain,
                      .data$quadrant, .data$baseline_bin),
      by = c("dataset_bundle_id", "chain")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      quadrant = factor(.data$quadrant, levels = c(
        "+AUPRC, -divergence", "+AUPRC, +divergence",
        "-AUPRC, -divergence", "-AUPRC, +divergence"
      ))
    )

  # Quadrant counts per (chain, baseline_bin).
  quad_bin_counts <- trajectory_long_q %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$state == "cold") %>%
    dplyr::count(.data$chain, .data$baseline_bin, .data$quadrant)
  cat("Quadrant counts per (chain, baseline_bin) [cold -> warm net]:\n")
  print(quad_bin_counts)

  # Centroid trajectory per (chain, baseline_bin).
  centroids_binned <- trajectory_long_q %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data$chain, .data$baseline_bin, .data$state) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      truth_drift = mean(.data$truth_drift, na.rm = TRUE),
      auprc = mean(.data$auprc, na.rm = TRUE),
      n = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(.data$chain, .data$baseline_bin, .data$state)

  quadrant_palette <- c(
    "+AUPRC, -divergence" = "#1b9e77",
    "+AUPRC, +divergence" = "#7570b3",
    "-AUPRC, -divergence" = "#e7298a",
    "-AUPRC, +divergence" = "#d95f02"
  )
  bin_linetype <- c(
    "[0, 0.05]"    = "solid",
    "(0.05, 0.10]" = "longdash",
    "(0.10, inf)"  = "dotted"
  )
  state_fill <- c(cold = "grey20", annotated = "#c44e52",
                  warm = "#4c72b0")

  p_trajectory_quadrant <- ggplot() +
    # Per-dataset paths, colored by cold->warm quadrant
    geom_path(
      data = trajectory_long_q,
      aes(x = .data$truth_drift, y = .data$auprc,
          group = interaction(.data$dataset_bundle_id, .data$chain),
          color = .data$quadrant),
      alpha = 0.18, linewidth = 0.5
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = quadrant_palette,
                       name = "Cold -> warm quadrant") +
    # Centroid arrows per baseline_bin (linetype distinguishes bin so the
    # color channel stays reserved for the quadrant scale above).
    geom_path(
      data = centroids_binned,
      aes(x = .data$truth_drift, y = .data$auprc,
          group = .data$baseline_bin,
          linetype = .data$baseline_bin),
      arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(2.5, "mm"),
                          type = "closed"),
      linewidth = 0.95,
      color = "black"
    ) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = bin_linetype,
                          name = "Baseline bin (centroid)") +
    # Centroid points: shape = state, fill = state
    geom_point(
      data = centroids_binned,
      aes(x = .data$truth_drift, y = .data$auprc,
          fill = .data$state),
      size = 3.0, shape = 21, color = "black", stroke = 0.4
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = state_fill, name = "State (centroid)") +
    facet_wrap(~ chain, nrow = 1,
               labeller = labeller(chain = chain_label_map)) +
    labs(
      x = basis_divergence_axis,
      y = "AUPRC",
      title = paste(
        "Trajectories colored by cold-to-warm outcome;",
        "centroids stratified by baseline divergence bin"
      ),
      subtitle = paste(
        "Faded paths: per-dataset cold -> annotated -> warm refit, colored by",
        "net (AUPRC, divergence) sign.",
        "Black arrows: chain centroid trajectory per baseline bin (linetype)."
      )
    ) +
    theme_effect_paper(base_size = 10) +
    theme(legend.position = "right",
          legend.box = "vertical")

  ggsave(
    file.path(diagnostic_dir, "truth_drift_trajectory_quadrant.png"),
    p_trajectory_quadrant, width = 11.5, height = 5.2, dpi = 220,
    bg = "white"
  )
  print(p_trajectory_quadrant)

  cat("Centroid coords per (chain, baseline_bin, state):\n")
  print(centroids_binned %>%
          dplyr::mutate(
            truth_drift = round(.data$truth_drift, 4),
            auprc = round(.data$auprc, 4)
          ))
} else {
  message(
    "Skipping quadrant trajectory; trajectory_long not in scope. ",
    "Run the explanatory-basis-divergence trajectory chunk first."
  )
}
```
